title: FinTrack Pro
desc: A real-time financial analytics dashboard for mid-market enterprises.
fullDesc: FinTrack Pro is a comprehensive financial analytics platform designed for mid-market enterprises. It provides real-time insights into revenue, expenses, and cash flow through intuitive dashboards and automated reporting. Built with a modern tech stack, the platform handles millions of transactions daily while maintaining sub-second response times. Our team designed and developed the entire solution from concept to launch, including custom data pipelines, role-based access control, and seamless integrations with major accounting software.

title: MedPortal Hub
desc: A healthcare management platform connecting patients with providers seamlessly.
fullDesc: MedPortal Hub is a full-featured healthcare management web application that streamlines patient-provider interactions. The platform includes appointment scheduling, electronic health records, telemedicine integration, and secure messaging. We built it with HIPAA compliance at its core, implementing end-to-end encryption and audit logging. The system serves over 500 healthcare providers and has facilitated more than 100,000 patient interactions since launch.

title: ShopVerse
desc: A high-performance e-commerce platform handling 10k+ daily orders.
fullDesc: ShopVerse is a custom-built e-commerce platform designed for a fast-growing retail brand. The site features dynamic product catalogs, real-time inventory management, AI-powered recommendations, and a lightning-fast checkout flow. We optimized every aspect of performance — achieving sub-2-second page loads and a 35% improvement in conversion rate compared to the previous platform. The system seamlessly integrates with warehouse management, shipping carriers, and multiple payment gateways.

title: UrbanBite
desc: Food delivery app with 50k+ downloads in the first quarter post-launch.
fullDesc: UrbanBite is a food delivery app built to connect local restaurants with hungry customers in urban areas. We developed native iOS and Android apps with a focus on speed and user experience — from browsing menus to tracking deliveries in real time. The platform includes a restaurant management portal, driver dispatch system, and integrated payment processing. Within the first quarter of launch, UrbanBite surpassed 50,000 downloads and partnered with over 200 local restaurants across three major cities.

title: FitPulse
desc: A fitness tracking app with personalized workout plans and social features.
fullDesc: FitPulse is a cross-platform fitness application that combines workout tracking, personalized training plans, and social accountability features. Users can log exercises, track progress with detailed charts, join community challenges, and share achievements. We integrated wearable device syncing (Apple Watch, Fitbit), built a custom recommendation engine for workout plans, and implemented real-time leaderboards. The app has maintained a 4.8-star rating across both app stores.

title: TravelMate
desc: An all-in-one travel planning app with offline maps and local guides.
fullDesc: TravelMate is a travel companion app that helps users plan trips, discover local experiences, and navigate unfamiliar cities — even offline. The app features curated city guides, offline map downloads, itinerary builders, expense splitting, and real-time flight tracking. We built the app with React Native for cross-platform delivery and implemented a custom offline-first architecture that syncs seamlessly when connectivity is restored. TravelMate has been featured in both the App Store and Google Play's travel category.

title: Aurora SEO Overhaul
desc: Complete technical SEO restructure that boosted organic traffic by 280%.
fullDesc: Aurora, a growing lifestyle brand, was struggling with poor search visibility despite having quality content. We conducted a full technical SEO audit and implemented a comprehensive restructure: site architecture optimization, schema markup implementation, Core Web Vitals improvements, internal linking strategy, and content gap analysis. Within six months, organic traffic increased by 280%, the site earned 45 featured snippets, and domain authority climbed from 28 to 52.

title: BuildRight Local SEO
desc: Local SEO strategy that made a construction firm #1 in their metro area.
fullDesc: BuildRight Construction needed to dominate local search results in their metro area. We implemented a comprehensive local SEO strategy including Google Business Profile optimization, local citation building, review management system, location-specific landing pages, and geo-targeted content. We also optimized their site for mobile-first indexing and added construction-specific schema markup. The result: BuildRight now ranks #1 for 15 high-value local keywords and saw a 200% increase in qualified leads from organic search.

title: Luxe E-Commerce SEO
desc: E-commerce SEO strategy generating $2M+ in additional annual revenue.
fullDesc: Luxe, a premium fashion retailer, was relying heavily on paid ads with minimal organic presence. We developed a tailored e-commerce SEO strategy covering product page optimization, category architecture redesign, rich snippet implementation, content marketing for top-of-funnel traffic, and a strategic backlink acquisition program. We also built a programmatic SEO system for long-tail product variations. The result was a 340% increase in organic revenue, generating over $2M in additional annual sales while reducing paid ad dependency by 40%.

title: GreenLeaf Launch
desc: Full-funnel digital marketing strategy that drove 3x lead generation.
fullDesc: GreenLeaf came to us with a revolutionary eco-friendly product but no digital presence. We crafted a full-funnel marketing strategy spanning paid search, social media advertising, content marketing, and email automation. The campaign included a complete brand identity refresh, landing page optimization, and an influencer partnership program. Within three months, we achieved a 3x increase in qualified leads and a 40% reduction in customer acquisition cost, establishing GreenLeaf as a recognizable name in the sustainable products space.

title: Nova Fitness Ads
desc: Performance marketing campaign achieving 5.2x ROAS for a fitness brand.
fullDesc: Nova Fitness needed to scale their online sales while maintaining profitability. We designed and executed a multi-channel performance marketing campaign across Google Ads, Meta, TikTok, and programmatic display. Our approach included creative A/B testing, audience segmentation, dynamic retargeting funnels, and conversion rate optimization on landing pages. The campaign achieved a 5.2x return on ad spend, generated over 15,000 new customers in four months, and established a repeatable growth framework for ongoing campaigns.

title: Zenith Rebrand Campaign
desc: Integrated rebrand launch campaign reaching 2M+ impressions in 30 days.
fullDesc: Zenith, a B2B software company, was undergoing a complete rebrand and needed a digital campaign to announce it. We orchestrated a synchronized launch across social media, email, PR, paid media, and their website. The campaign included teaser content, a live virtual event, influencer partnerships, and interactive brand experiences. In 30 days, the campaign generated over 2 million impressions, 50,000 website visits, and a 65% increase in demo requests — successfully repositioning Zenith in their competitive market.

title: RetailPulse Analytics
desc: Real-time retail analytics platform processing 1M+ daily events.
fullDesc: RetailPulse is a custom analytics platform built for a national retail chain to unify data from 200+ stores. We designed real-time data pipelines ingesting POS transactions, inventory movements, foot traffic sensors, and online sales into a centralized warehouse. The interactive dashboard suite provides store managers with daily KPIs, regional directors with trend analysis, and executives with strategic forecasts. The platform processes over 1 million events daily and has driven a 15% improvement in inventory turnover.

title: HealthMetrics BI
desc: Business intelligence platform for a hospital network analyzing patient outcomes.
fullDesc: HealthMetrics BI is a HIPAA-compliant business intelligence platform built for a multi-hospital network. We integrated data from electronic health records, billing systems, patient surveys, and operational databases to create comprehensive analytics dashboards. The platform enables clinical teams to track patient outcomes, identify care quality trends, and optimize resource allocation. Custom predictive models help forecast patient volumes and flag potential readmission risks, contributing to a 20% reduction in 30-day readmission rates.

title: AdSpend Optimizer
desc: Marketing attribution platform that saved $500K in annual ad spend.
fullDesc: AdSpend Optimizer is a custom marketing attribution and analytics platform built for a multi-brand e-commerce company. We developed multi-touch attribution models, customer journey mapping, and cross-channel performance dashboards. The platform integrates data from 12 marketing channels, CRM systems, and transactional databases to provide a single source of truth for marketing ROI. By identifying underperforming channels and reallocating budgets based on data-driven insights, the client saved over $500K annually while increasing overall conversion rates by 25%.

title: Solaris Energy Brand
desc: Complete brand identity for a renewable energy startup that secured Series A.
fullDesc: Solaris Energy needed a compelling brand identity to stand out in the competitive renewable energy market and attract investor interest. We developed a complete brand strategy including positioning, messaging framework, visual identity system, pitch deck design, and brand guidelines. The cohesive brand story we crafted emphasized innovation and sustainability, resonating with both consumers and investors. Solaris successfully closed their $8M Series A round, with investors citing the strong brand presence as a key differentiator.

title: PureBlend Positioning
desc: Brand repositioning that increased premium product line revenue by 150%.
fullDesc: PureBlend, a natural skincare company, was perceived as a budget brand despite having premium-quality products. We conducted extensive market research, competitor analysis, and customer interviews to develop a repositioning strategy. The new brand identity, messaging, packaging design, and go-to-market approach elevated PureBlend into the premium segment. We also developed a content strategy and influencer program to reinforce the new positioning. Within one year, their premium product line revenue increased by 150% and average order value grew by 60%.

title: NexGen Brand Architecture
desc: Multi-brand architecture strategy for a tech conglomerate with 5 sub-brands.
fullDesc: NexGen Technologies had acquired multiple companies but lacked a unified brand architecture. Each sub-brand operated independently, creating confusion in the market. We designed a comprehensive brand architecture strategy defining the relationship between the parent brand and five sub-brands, including naming conventions, visual hierarchy, co-branding rules, and shared brand values. We also developed individual brand guidelines for each sub-brand while maintaining cohesion. The new architecture improved cross-selling by 40% and strengthened overall brand recognition in the enterprise market.
